title: E-commerce Fulfilment and Customer Experience Executive
description:
About Us

Reckless Ericka is a Singapore-based premium women’s wear brand built on craftsmanship, attention to detail, and meaningful customer relationships. We operate across e-commerce and studio retail, and every order, message, and visit reflects our brand promise.

We are looking for a highly organised, customer-centric executor who takes pride in accuracy, speed, and service excellence. This role sits at the heart of our daily operations and directly impacts how customers experience the brand.

Key Responsibilities

1. Fulfilment & Order Operations (Primary Ownership)

  • Own the end-to-end fulfilment process across online and studio orders, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and quality control.
  • Pack and dispatch orders according to brand standards, including checks for sizing, condition, and presentation.
  • Track daily order status and delivery timelines; proactively flag and resolve exceptions.
  • Liaise with logistics and courier partners to resolve delivery issues efficiently and professionally.
  • Maintain fulfilment SOPs and continuously improve turnaround time and accuracy.

2. E-commerce & Inventory Operations

  • Maintain accurate product listings, stock levels, and order data on Shopify and related systems.
  • Perform regular stock checks and reconcile inventory discrepancies across online and studio sales.
  • Support basic e-commerce reporting (orders, returns, fulfilment issues, customer trends).
  • Highlight recurring operational issues and suggest improvements to enhance customer experience and efficiency.

3. Customer Experience & Support

  • Provide prompt, empathetic, and professional customer support via email, live chat, WhatsApp, and social platforms.
  • Handle returns, exchanges, and complaints in line with company policies, ensuring fair and consistent resolutions.
  • Manage studio appointments and walk-ins, delivering a warm, attentive, and brand-aligned experience.
  • Act as a brand ambassador in every customer interaction, both online and in person.

4. Studio & Operational Support

  • Assist in maintaining a clean, organised, and welcoming studio environment.
  • Support day-to-day operational tasks that impact customer satisfaction.
  • Identify customer pain points across fulfilment, service, and studio experience, and proactively propose solutions.

Requirements

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification in Business, E-commerce, Retail, or related fields.
  • Minimum 2–3 years of relevant experience in e-commerce operations, fulfilment, or customer service.
  • Hands-on experience with Shopify and order management workflows.
  • Strong sense of ownership, accountability, and attention to detail.
  • Clear written and verbal communication skills.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-moving SME environment.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

  • Experience with inventory systems, courier platforms, or fulfilment tools.
  • Retail or studio-based customer interaction experience.
  • Ability to analyse basic operational data and identify improvement opportunities.
  • Familiarity with WhatsApp Business or CRM tools.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary aligned with experience and market standards.
  • Direct exposure to end-to-end e-commerce operations in a growing brand.
  • Supportive, collaborative team culture.
  • Opportunities to grow into senior operations or CX roles.

How to Apply

Please email your CV and a short cover letter explaining your relevant experience and interest in the role to:
info@recklessericka.com

Kindly state the position applied for in the email subject.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
